select.isEmpty: SELECT A.BRD_ID brd_id , A.BRD_NM brd_nm , A.BRD_NM2 brd_nm2 , A.BRD_LEVEL brd_level , A.BRD_STEP brd_step , A.BRD_POSTTERM brd_postterm , A.BRD_UPPER brd_upper , A.BRD_GB brd_gb , A.BRD_URL brd_url , A.BRD_EXPLAIN brd_explain , A.BRD_ACCESS brd_access , A.ATTACH_SIZE attach_size , ( SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(BRD_ID) , 0) FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = A.BRD_ID AND Brd_Company = #v_P_CompanyID# AND Brd_GB = '1' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) sub_clscnt , ( SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(BRD_ID) , 0) FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = A.BRD_ID AND Brd_Company = #v_P_CompanyID# AND Brd_GB = '2' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) sub_rescnt , '0' Access_Lvl , A.APPROVEFLAG FROM TBL_RS_BRD A WHERE BRD_ID = 1 AND Brd_Company = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

isNotEmpty.isEqual: SELECT A.BRD_ID brd_id , A.BRD_NM brd_nm , A.BRD_NM2 brd_nm2 , A.BRD_LEVEL brd_level , A.BRD_STEP brd_step , A.BRD_POSTTERM brd_postterm , A.BRD_UPPER brd_upper , A.BRD_GB brd_gb , A.BRD_URL brd_url , A.BRD_EXPLAIN brd_explain , A.BRD_ACCESS brd_access , A.ATTACH_SIZE attach_size , ( SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(BRD_ID) , 0) FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = A.BRD_ID AND Brd_Company = #v_P_CompanyID# AND Brd_GB = '1' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) sub_clscnt , ( SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(BRD_ID) , 0) FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = A.BRD_ID AND Brd_Company = #v_P_CompanyID# AND Brd_GB = '2' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) sub_rescnt , '0' Access_Lvl , A.APPROVEFLAG FROM TBL_RS_BRD A WHERE Brd_Upper = IFNULL(#v_P_ParentID#,0) AND Brd_Company = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY Brd_Step
isNotEmpty.isNotEqual: SELECT A.BRD_ID brd_id , A.BRD_NM brd_nm , A.BRD_NM2 brd_nm2 , A.BRD_LEVEL brd_level , A.BRD_STEP brd_step , A.BRD_POSTTERM brd_postterm , A.BRD_UPPER brd_upper , A.BRD_GB brd_gb , A.BRD_URL brd_url , A.BRD_EXPLAIN brd_explain , A.BRD_ACCESS brd_access , A.ATTACH_SIZE attach_size , ( SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(BRD_ID) , 0) FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = A.BRD_ID AND Brd_Company = #v_P_CompanyID# AND Brd_GB = '1' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) sub_clscnt , ( SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(BRD_ID) , 0) FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = A.BRD_ID AND Brd_Company = #v_P_CompanyID# AND Brd_GB = '2' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) sub_rescnt , '0' Access_Lvl , A.APPROVEFLAG FROM TBL_RS_BRD A WHERE Brd_Upper = IFNULL(#v_P_ParentID#,0) AND Brd_Company = #v_P_CompanyID# AND Brd_GB = '1' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY Brd_Step

select.isEmpty: SELECT A.BRD_ID BRD_ID , A.BRD_NM BRD_NM , A.BRD_NM2 BRD_NM2 , A.BRD_LEVEL BRD_LEVEL , A.BRD_STEP BRD_STEP , A.BRD_POSTTERM BRD_POSTTERM , A.BRD_UPPER BRD_UPPER , A.BRD_GB BRD_GB , A.BRD_URL BRD_URL , A.BRD_EXPLAIN BRD_EXPLAIN , A.BRD_ACCESS BRD_ACCESS , A.ATTACH_SIZE ATTACH_SIZE , ( SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(BRD_ID) , 0) FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = A.BRD_ID AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_COMPANYID# AND BRD_GB = '1' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) SUB_CLSCNT , ( SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(BRD_ID) , 0) FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = A.BRD_ID AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_COMPANYID# AND BRD_GB = '2' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) SUB_RESCNT , '0' ACCESS_LVL , A.APPROVEFLAG FROM TBL_RS_BRD A LEFT JOIN TBL_RS_RESACL B ON A.BRD_ID = B.RESID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.BRD_ID = 1 AND A.BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_COMPANYID# AND ( MEMBER_ID = #v_PCOMID# OR MEMBER_ID = #v_PDEPTID# OR MEMBER_ID = #v_PUSERID# OR MEMBER_ID = 'everyone' OR MEMBER_ID IS NULL ) AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
select.isNotEmpty:
SELECT DISTINCT(BRD_ID) , A.BRD_NM AS BRD_NM, A.BRD_NM2 AS BRD_NM2, A.BRD_LEVEL AS BRD_LEVEL, A.BRD_STEP AS BRD_STEP, A.BRD_POSTTERM AS BRD_POSTTERM, A.BRD_UPPER AS BRD_UPPER, A.BRD_GB AS BRD_GB, A.BRD_URL AS BRD_URL, A.BRD_EXPLAIN AS BRD_EXPLAIN, A.BRD_ACCESS AS BRD_ACCESS, A.ATTACH_SIZE AS ATTACH_SIZE, (SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(BRD_ID), 0) FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = A.BRD_ID AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_COMPANYID# AND BRD_GB = '1' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#) AS SUB_CLSCNT, (SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(BRD_ID), 0) FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = A.BRD_ID AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_COMPANYID# AND BRD_GB = '2' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#) AS SUB_RESCNT, '' AS ACCESS_LVL, A.APPROVEFLAG FROM TBL_RS_BRD A LEFT JOIN TBL_RS_RESACL B ON A.BRD_ID = B.RESID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.BRD_UPPER = #v_P_PARENTID# AND A.BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_COMPANYID# AND A.BRD_GB = '1' AND (MEMBER_ID = #v_PCOMID# OR MEMBER_ID= #v_PDEPTID# OR MEMBER_ID = #v_PUSERID# OR MEMBER_ID = 'everyone' OR MEMBER_ID IS NULL) AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
UNION
SELECT DISTINCT(BRD_ID) , A.BRD_NM AS BRD_NM, A.BRD_NM2 AS BRD_NM2, A.BRD_LEVEL AS BRD_LEVEL, A.BRD_STEP AS BRD_STEP, A.BRD_POSTTERM AS BRD_POSTTERM, A.BRD_UPPER AS BRD_UPPER, A.BRD_GB AS BRD_GB, A.BRD_URL AS BRD_URL, A.BRD_EXPLAIN AS BRD_EXPLAIN, A.BRD_ACCESS AS BRD_ACCESS, A.ATTACH_SIZE AS ATTACH_SIZE, 0 AS SUB_CLSCNT, 0 AS SUB_RESCNT, '' AS ACCESS_LVL, A.APPROVEFLAG FROM TBL_RS_BRD A LEFT JOIN TBL_RS_RESACL B ON A.BRD_ID = B.RESID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.BRD_UPPER = #v_P_PARENTID# AND A.BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_COMPANYID# AND A.BRD_GB = '2' AND (MEMBER_ID = #v_PCOMID# OR MEMBER_ID= #v_PDEPTID# OR MEMBER_ID = #v_PUSERID# OR MEMBER_ID = 'everyone' OR MEMBER_ID IS NULL) AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY BRD_GB, BRD_STEP

sqlMap.select: SELECT BRD_ID , CASE #v_LANG# WHEN'1' THEN BRD_NM ELSE BRD_NM2 END BRD_NM, APPROVEFLAG FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = #v_BRD_ID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_COMPANY# AND BRD_GB = '2' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY BRD_GB, BRD_STEP

SELECT NUM , PNUM , OWNERID , A.title title , LOCATION , TIMEDISPLAY , DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') STARTDATE , DATE_FORMAT(ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') ENDDATE , ALERTTIME , REFLAG , GRESFLAG , WRITERID , CONTENT , IMPORTANCE , ENTRYLIST , ALLDAY , DATE_FORMAT(WRITEDAY, '%Y-%m-%d %T') WRITEDAY , ATTACHFLAG , CHARACTERID , APPROVEFLAG , B.DISPLAYNAME OWNERNM , B.DISPLAYNAME2 OWNERNM2 , B.DESCRIPTION DEPTNM , B.DESCRIPTION2 DEPTNM2 , B.TITLE JOBTITLE , B.TITLE2 JOBTITLE2 FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE A JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.WRITERID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE STARTDATE <= STR_TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %T') AND STR_TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %T') <= ENDDATE AND COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND ( A.OWNERID = #v_POWNERID# AND PNUM = 0 AND REFLAG <> '1' OR REFLAG = '2' ) AND ( B.DISPLAYNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_WRITERNAME#, '%') OR B.DISPLAYNAME2 LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_WRITERNAME#, '%') ) AND ( B.DESCRIPTION LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_WRITERDEPT#, '%') OR B.DESCRIPTION2 LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_WRITERDEPT#, '%') ) AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY STARTDATE ASC, ENDDATE DESC

SELECT NUM , PNUM , SCH.OWNERID , TITLE , LOCATION , TIMEDISPLAY , DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') STARTDATE , DATE_FORMAT(ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') ENDDATE , ALERTTIME , REFLAG , GRESFLAG , WRITERID , CONTENT , IMPORTANCE , ENTRYLIST , ALLDAY , DATE_FORMAT(WRITEDAY, '%Y-%m-%d %T') WRITEDAY , ATTACHFLAG , CHARACTERID , SCH.APPROVEFLAG , SCH.OWNERNM , DEPTNM , SCH.COMPANYID FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE SCH JOIN TBL_RS_BRD BRD ON SCH.OWNERID = BRD.BRD_ID AND SCH.TENANT_ID = BRD.TENANT_ID WHERE STARTDATE <= STR_TO_DATE(#v_pStartDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %T') AND STR_TO_DATE(#v_pEndDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %T') <= ENDDATE AND COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# AND ( PNUM = 0 AND REFLAG <> '1' OR REFLAG = '2' ) AND BRD.BRD_UPPER = #v_pOwnerID# AND SCH.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY STARTDATE ASC, ENDDATE DESC

SELECT A.num , PNUM , A.ownerID , A.title title , LOCATION , TIMEDISPLAY , DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') STARTDATE , DATE_FORMAT(ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') ENDDATE , ALERTTIME , REFLAG , GRESFLAG , WRITERID , CONTENT , IMPORTANCE , ENTRYLIST , ALLDAY , DATE_FORMAT(WRITEDAY, '%Y-%m-%d %T') WRITEDAY , ATTACHFLAG , A.companyID , CHARACTERID , APPROVEFLAG , B.DISPLAYNAME OWNERNM , B.DISPLAYNAME2 OWNERNM2 , B.DESCRIPTION DEPTNM , B.DESCRIPTION2 DEPTNM2 , B.TITLE JOBTITLE , B.TITLE2 JOBTITLE2 FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE A JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.writerID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_RS_SCHEDULERepetition C ON A.ownerID = C.ownerID AND A.num = C.num AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE STARTDATE <= STR_TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %T') AND A.COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND A.OWNERID = #v_POWNERID# AND REFLAG = '1' AND ( STR_TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#,'%Y-%m-%d %T') <= ENDDATETIME OR STR_TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#,'%Y-%m-%d %T') >= ENDDATETIME ) AND ( B.DISPLAYNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_WRITERNAME#, '%') OR B.DISPLAYNAME2 LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_WRITERNAME#, '%') ) AND ( B.DESCRIPTION LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_WRITERDEPT#, '%') OR B.DESCRIPTION2 LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_WRITERDEPT#, '%') ) AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY STARTDATE ASC, ENDDATE DESC

SELECT NUM , PNUM , SCH.ownerID , TITLE , LOCATION , TIMEDISPLAY , DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') STARTDATE , DATE_FORMAT(ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') ENDDATE , ALERTTIME , REFLAG , GRESFLAG , WRITERID , CONTENT , IMPORTANCE , ENTRYLIST , ALLDAY , DATE_FORMAT(WRITEDAY, '%Y-%m-%d %T') WRITEDAY , ATTACHFLAG , CHARACTERID , SCH.ApproveFlag , SCH.ownerNM , DEPTNM , SCH.companyID FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE SCH JOIN TBL_RS_BRD BRD ON SCH.OWNERID = BRD.BRD_ID AND SCH.TENANT_ID = BRD.TENANT_ID WHERE STARTDATE <= STR_TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %T') AND COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND BRD.Brd_Upper = #v_POWNERID# AND REFLAG = '1' AND SCH.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY STARTDATE ASC, ENDDATE DESC

SELECT OWNERID, NUM, COMPANYID, DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATETIME, '%Y-%m-%d %T') STARTDATETIME, DATE_FORMAT(ENDDATETIME, '%Y-%m-%d %T') ENDDATETIME, REWAY, RENUM, REDAY, REYOIL, REMONTH, REORD, ENDFLAG, RECOUNT, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULEREPETITION WHERE COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# AND OWNERID = #v_pOwnerID# AND NUM = #v_pNum# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT NUM , PNUM , OWNERID , A.title title , LOCATION , TIMEDISPLAY , DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') STARTDATE , DATE_FORMAT(ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') ENDDATE , ALERTTIME , REFLAG , GRESFLAG , WRITERID , CONTENT , IMPORTANCE , ENTRYLIST , ALLDAY , DATE_FORMAT(WRITEDAY, '%Y-%m-%d %T') WRITEDAY , ATTACHFLAG , CHARACTERID , APPROVEFLAG , OWNERNM , DEPTNM , B.TITLE JOBTITLE , B.TITLE2 JOBTITLE2 FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE A JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.WRITERID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND OWNERID = #v_POWNERID# AND PNUM = #v_PNUM# AND STARTDATE <= STR_TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %T') AND STR_TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %T') <= ENDDATE AND ( B.DISPLAYNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_WRITERNAME#, '%') OR B.DISPLAYNAME2 LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_WRITERNAME#, '%') ) AND ( B.DESCRIPTION LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_WRITERDEPT#, '%') OR B.DESCRIPTION2 LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_WRITERDEPT#, '%') ) AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY STARTDATE ASC, ENDDATE DESC

SELECT ATTACH_SIZE, BRD_ACCESS, BRD_COMPANY, BRD_COUNT, BRD_EXPLAIN, BRD_GB, BRD_GROUP, BRD_ID, BRD_LEVEL, $v_PBRDNM$ AS BRD_NM, BRD_POSTTERM, BRD_REF, BRD_STEP, BRD_UPPER, BRD_URL, MAKEDATE, OWNDEPTID, $v_POWNDEPTNM$ AS OWNDEPTNM, OWNERCALL, OWNERID, $v_POWNERNM$ AS OWNERNM, $v_POWNERPOSITION$ AS OWNERPOSITION, REPLY_MAIL_FG, RESLOCATION FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = #v_PBRDID# AND BRD_GB = '2' AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# LIMIT #v_PTOPCNT#
SELECT COUNT(BRD_ID) cnt FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = #v_PBRDID# AND BRD_GB = '2' AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT BRD_ID , BRD_NM , BRD_NM2 , BRD_EXPLAIN , OWNDEPTID , OWNDEPTNM , OWNDEPTNM2 , OWNERID , OWNERNM , OWNERNM2 , OWNERPOSITION , OWNERPOSITION2 , OWNERCALL , IFNULL(RESLOCATION, ' ') RESLOCATION , CONCAT(SUBSTR(MAKEDATE, 1, 4), '-', SUBSTR(MAKEDATE, 5, 2), '-', SUBSTR(MAKEDATE, 7, 2)) MAKEDATE , IFNULL(APPROVEFLAG, '0') APPROVEFLAG , BRD_ACCESS FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pBrdID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_pCompanyID# AND BRD_GB = '2' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_ID = #v_P_Brd_ID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_RS_BRD SET BRD_STEP = BRD_STEP - 1 WHERE BRD_UPPER = ( SELECT S1.BRD_UPPER FROM ( SELECT * FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_ID = #v_P_Brd_ID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) AS S1 ) AND BRD_STEP > ( SELECT S2.BRD_STEP FROM ( SELECT * FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_ID = #v_P_Brd_ID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) AS S2 ) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE OWNERID = #v_P_Brd_ID# AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULEREPETITION WHERE OWNERID = #v_P_Brd_ID# AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_RS_BRD SET OWNDEPTID = #v_P_ODeptID#, OWNDEPTNM = #v_P_ODeptNm#, OWNERID = #v_P_OwnerID#, OWNERNM = #v_P_OwnerNm#, OWNERPOSITION = #v_P_OwnerPos#, OWNERCALL = #v_P_OwnerCall#, BRD_NM = #v_P_Brd_NM#, RESLOCATION = #v_P_ResLocation#, BRD_EXPLAIN = #v_P_Brd_Explain#, APPROVEFLAG = #v_P_Approve#, BRD_NM2 = #v_P_Brd_NM2#, OWNDEPTNM2 = #v_P_ODeptNm2#, OWNERNM2 = #v_P_OwnerNm2#, OWNERPOSITION2 = #v_P_OwnerPos2# WHERE BRD_ID = #v_P_Brd_ID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT (IFNULL(MAX(BRD_ID) , 0) + 1) FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT (BRD_LEVEL + 1) FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_ID = #v_P_ClassGB# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT (IFNULL(MAX(Brd_Step) , 0) + 1) FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = #v_P_ClassGB# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_RS_BRD ( BRD_UPPER, OWNDEPTID, OWNDEPTNM, OWNERID, OWNERNM, OWNERPOSITION, OWNERCALL, BRD_NM, RESLOCATION, BRD_EXPLAIN, BRD_COMPANY, BRD_ID, BRD_GB, BRD_LEVEL, BRD_STEP, MAKEDATE, ATTACH_SIZE, BRD_GROUP, BRD_URL, BRD_ACCESS, BRD_POSTTERM, BRD_COUNT, BRD_REF, APPROVEFLAG, BRD_NM2, OWNDEPTNM2, OWNERNM2, OWNERPOSITION2, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_P_ClassGB#, #v_P_ODeptID#, #v_P_ODeptNm#, #v_P_OwnerID#, #v_P_OwnerNm#, #v_P_OwnerPos#, #v_P_OwnerCall#, #v_P_Brd_NM#, #v_P_ResLocation#, #v_P_Brd_Explain#, #v_P_CompanyID#, #v_Brd_ID#, #v_Brd_GB#, #v_Brd_Level#, #v_Brd_Step#, DATE_FORMAT(UTC_TIMESTAMP(),'%Y%m%d'), 20, 'A00', '', #v_Brd_Access#, 365, 0, 0, #v_P_Approve#, #v_P_Brd_NM2#, #v_P_ODeptNm2#, #v_P_OwnerNm2#, #v_P_OwnerPos2#, #tenantID# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_RS_SCHEDULE SET APPROVEFLAG = #v_PAPPROVE# WHERE COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND OWNERID = #v_POWNERID# AND NUM = #v_PNUM# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

UPDATE TBL_RS_SCHEDULE SET STARTDATE = STR_TO_DATE(#v_pStartDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %T'), ENDDATE = STR_TO_DATE(#v_pEndDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %T') WHERE COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# AND OWNERID = #v_pOwnerID# AND NUM = #v_pNum# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

UPDATE TBL_RS_SCHEDULEREPETITION SET STARTDATETIME = STR_TO_DATE(#v_pStartDateTime#, '%Y-%m-%d %T'), ENDDATETIME = STR_TO_DATE(#v_pEndDateTime#, '%Y-%m-%d %T'), REWAY = #v_pReWay#, REDAY = #v_pReDay#, RENUM = #v_pReNum#, REYOIL = #v_pReYoil#, REMONTH = #v_pReMonth#, REORD = #v_pReOrd#, ENDFLAG = #v_pEndFlag#, RECOUNT = #v_pReCount# WHERE COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# AND NUM = #v_pNum# AND OWNERID = #v_pOwnerID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT OWNERID, NUM, PNUM, COMPANYID, WRITERID, DEPTNM, OWNERNM, TITLE, LOCATION, TIMEDISPLAY, DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') STARTDATE, DATE_FORMAT(ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') ENDDATE, ALLDAY, ALERTTIME, CONTENT, IMPORTANCE, REFLAG, GRESFLAG, DATE_FORMAT(WRITEDAY, '%Y-%m-%d %T') WRITEDAY, ENTRYLIST, CHARACTERID, ATTACHFLAG, PUBLICFLAG, APPROVEFLAG, SCHEDULEID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# AND OWNERID = #v_pOwnerID# AND NUM = #v_pNum# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT (IFNULL(MAX(num) , 1)) FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# AND OWNERID = #v_pOwnerID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_RS_SCHEDULEREPETITION (NUM, OWNERID, STARTDATETIME, ENDDATETIME, REWAY, REDAY, RENUM, REYOIL, REMONTH, REORD, ENDFLAG, RECOUNT, COMPANYID, TENANT_ID) VALUES ( #v_Num#, #v_pOwnerID#, STR_TO_DATE(#v_pStartDateTime#, '%Y-%m-%d %T'), STR_TO_DATE(#v_pEndDateTime#, '%Y-%m-%d %T'), #v_pReWay#, #v_pReDay#, #v_pReNum#, #v_pReYoil#, #v_pReMonth#, #v_pReOrd#, #v_pEndFlag#, #v_pReCount#, #v_pCompanyID#, #tenantID# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT OWNERID, NUM, PNUM, COMPANYID, WRITERID, DEPTNM, OWNERNM, TITLE, LOCATION, TIMEDISPLAY, DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') STARTDATE, DATE_FORMAT(ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') ENDDATE, ALLDAY, ALERTTIME, CONTENT, IMPORTANCE, REFLAG, GRESFLAG, DATE_FORMAT(WRITEDAY, '%Y-%m-%d %T') WRITEDAY, ENTRYLIST, CHARACTERID, ATTACHFLAG, PUBLICFLAG, APPROVEFLAG, SCHEDULEID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# AND PNUM = #v_pNum# AND OWNERID = #v_pEntryID# AND WRITERID = #v_pOwnerID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULEREPETITION WHERE OWNERID = #v_pOwnerID# AND NUM = #v_pNum# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT RESID , BRDNM , FORMTEXT FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULEFORM WHERE RESID = #v_pRESID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT OWNERID FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_COMPANY = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND BRD_ID = #v_PBRDID# AND OWNERID = #v_PUSERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT BRD_UPPER FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_COMPANY = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND BRD_ID = #v_PBRDID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT ACCESS_LVL FROM TBL_RS_RESACL WHERE COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND RESID = #v_BRD_UPPER# AND MEMBER_ID = #v_PUSERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT IFNULL(APPROVEFLAG, '0') APPROVEFLAG FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_ID = #v_PBRDID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND BRD_GB = '2' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULEFORM WHERE RESID = #v_RESID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_RS_SCHEDULEFORM ( RESID, BRDNM, FORMTEXT, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_RESID#, #v_BRDNM3#, #v_FORMTEXT#, #tenantID# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_RS_SCHEDULEFORM SET BRDNM = #v_BRDNM#, FORMTEXT = #v_FORMTEXT# WHERE RESID = #v_RESID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULEFORM WHERE RESID = #v_DELCODE# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT * FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND NUM = #v_P_num# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_RS_SCHEDULE SET REFLAG = '4' WHERE COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND NUM = #v_P_num# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT IFNULL(MAX(num) , 0) + 1 FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_RS_SCHEDULE ( num, pnum, ownerID, writerID, deptNM, ownerNM, title, location, timeDisplay, startDate, endDate, alertTime, CONTENT, importance, reFlag, gresFlag, entryList, allDay, writeDay, companyID, characterID, attachFlag, tenant_ID ) SELECT #v_MaxNum# num , #v_P_pnum# pnum , OWNERID , WRITERID , DEPTNM , OWNERNM , TITLE , LOCATION , TIMEDISPLAY , STR_TO_DATE(#v_P_sDate#,'%Y-%m-%d %T') startDate , STR_TO_DATE(#v_P_eDate#,'%Y-%m-%d %T') endDate , ALERTTIME , CONTENT , IMPORTANCE , 4 reFlag , GRESFLAG , ENTRYLIST , ALLDAY , STR_TO_DATE(#nowDate#,'%Y-%m-%d %T') writeDay , #v_P_companyID# companyID , CHARACTERID , ATTACHFLAG , tenant_ID FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND NUM = #v_P_pnum# AND REFLAG = '1' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND PNUM = #v_P_num# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULEREPETITION WHERE COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND NUM = #v_P_num# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND NUM = #v_P_num# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT OWNERNM FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND NUM = #v_P_num# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT DEPTNM FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND NUM = #v_P_num# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE ( COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND NUM = #v_P_num# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) OR ( COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND PNUM = #v_P_num# AND REFLAG >= 3 AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_RS_SCHEDULE ( num, ownerID, writerID, title, location, timeDisplay, startDate, endDate, alertTime, CONTENT, importance, reFlag, gresFlag, entryList, allDay, writeDay, attachFlag, companyID, characterID, ownerNM, deptNM, ApproveFlag, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_P_num#, #v_P_ownerID#, #v_P_writerID#, #v_P_title#, #v_P_location#, #v_P_timeDisplay#, STR_TO_DATE(#v_P_startDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %T'), STR_TO_DATE(#v_P_endDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %T'), #v_P_alertTime#, #v_P_content#, #v_P_importance#, #v_P_reFlag#, #v_P_gresFlag#, #v_P_entryList#, #v_P_allDay#, #nowDate#, #v_P_attachFlag#, #v_P_companyID#, #v_P_characterID#, #v_tmpOwnerNm#, #v_tmpDeptNm#, #v_P_Approve#, #tenantID# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_RS_SCHEDULE SET TITLE = #v_P_title#, LOCATION = #v_P_location#, TIMEDISPLAY = #v_P_timeDisplay#, STARTDATE = STR_TO_DATE(#v_P_startDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %T'), ENDDATE = STR_TO_DATE(#v_P_endDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %T'), ALERTTIME = #v_P_alertTime#, CONTENT = #v_P_content#, IMPORTANCE = #v_P_importance#, REFLAG = #v_P_reFlag#, GRESFLAG = #v_P_gresFlag#, ALLDAY = #v_P_allDay#, WRITEDAY = #nowDate#, ENTRYLIST = #v_P_entryList#, ATTACHFLAG = #v_P_attachFlag#, CHARACTERID = #v_P_characterID# WHERE COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND NUM = #v_P_num# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert:
SELECT (IFNULL(MAX(num) , 0) + 1) FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_P_writerID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
INSERT INTO TBL_RS_SCHEDULE ( num, pnum, ownerID, writerID, title, location, timeDisplay, startDate, endDate, alertTime, CONTENT, importance, reFlag, gresFlag, entryList, allDay, writeDay, attachFlag, companyID, characterID, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #maxNum#, #v_P_pnum#, #v_P_ownerID#, #v_P_writerID#, #v_P_title#, #v_P_location#, #v_P_timeDisplay#, #v_P_startDate#, #v_P_endDate#, #v_P_alertTime#, #v_P_content#, #v_P_importance#, 3, #v_P_gresFlag#, #v_P_entryList#, #v_P_allDay#, #nowDate#, #v_P_attachFlag#, #v_P_companyID#, #v_P_characterID#, #tenantID# )
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND PNUM = #v_P_num# AND REFLAG >= 3 AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_RS_SCHEDULE SET TITLE = #v_P_title#, LOCATION = #v_P_location#, TIMEDISPLAY = #v_P_timeDisplay#, STARTDATE = STR_TO_DATE(#v_P_startDate#,'%Y-%m-%d %T'), ENDDATE = STR_TO_DATE(#v_P_endDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %T'), ALERTTIME = #v_P_alertTime#, CONTENT = #v_P_content#, IMPORTANCE = #v_P_importance#, REFLAG = #v_P_reFlag#, GRESFLAG = #v_P_gresFlag#, ALLDAY = #v_P_allDay#, WRITEDAY = STR_TO_DATE(#nowDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %T'), ENTRYLIST = #v_P_entryList#, ATTACHFLAG = #v_P_attachFlag#, CHARACTERID = #v_P_characterID#, APPROVEFLAG = #v_P_Approve# WHERE COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND NUM = #v_P_num# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT APPROVEFLAG FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_ID = #v_P_ownerID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert:
SELECT (IFNULL(MAX(num) , 0) + 1) FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
INSERT INTO TBL_RS_SCHEDULE ( OWNERID, NUM, PNUM, COMPANYID, WRITERID, DEPTNM, OWNERNM, TITLE, LOCATION, TIMEDISPLAY, STARTDATE, ENDDATE, ALLDAY, ALERTTIME, CONTENT, IMPORTANCE , REFLAG, GRESFLAG, WRITEDAY, ENTRYLIST, CHARACTERID, ATTACHFLAG, APPROVEFLAG, SCHEDULEID, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_P_ownerID#, #v_Num#, #v_P_pnum#, #v_P_companyID#, #v_P_writerID#, #v_P_deptNM#, #v_P_ownerNM#, #v_P_title# , #v_P_location#, #v_P_timeDisplay#, STR_TO_DATE(#v_P_startDate#,'%Y-%m-%d %T'), STR_TO_DATE(#v_P_endDate#,'%Y-%m-%d %T') , #v_P_allDay#, #v_P_alertTime#, #v_P_content#, #v_P_importance#, IFNULL(#v_P_reFlag#,' '), IFNULL(#v_P_gresFlag#,' '), STR_TO_DATE(#nowDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %T') , #v_P_entryList#, IFNULL(#v_P_characterID#,0), #v_P_attachFlag#, #v_P_Approve#, #v_P_ScheduleID#, #tenantID# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT OWNERID, NUM, COMPANYID, DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATETIME, '%Y-%m-%d %T') STARTDATETIME, DATE_FORMAT(ENDDATETIME, '%Y-%m-%d %T') ENDDATETIME, REWAY, RENUM, REDAY, REYOIL, REMONTH, REORD, ENDFLAG, RECOUNT, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULEREPETITION WHERE COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# AND OWNERID = #v_pOwnerID# AND NUM = #v_pNum# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT OWNERID , NUM , PNUM , COMPANYID , WRITERID , DEPTNM , OWNERNM , TITLE , LOCATION , TIMEDISPLAY , DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') STARTDATE , DATE_FORMAT(ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') ENDDATE , ALLDAY , ALERTTIME , CONTENT , IMPORTANCE , REFLAG , GRESFLAG , DATE_FORMAT(WRITEDAY, '%Y-%m-%d %T') WRITEDAY , ENTRYLIST , CHARACTERID , ATTACHFLAG , PUBLICFLAG , APPROVEFLAG FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE CompanyID = #v_p_companyID# AND OwnerID = #v_p_ownerID# AND reFlag = 0 AND Num <> ( CASE #v_p_cmd# WHEN 'add' THEN -1 ELSE #v_p_num# END ) AND ApproveFlag = '1' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT C.ownerID as ownerID , C.num as num , C.companyID , DATE_FORMAT(C.startDateTime, '%Y-%m-%d %T') startDateTime , DATE_FORMAT(C.endDateTime, '%Y-%m-%d %T') endDateTime , C.reWay as reWay, C.reNum as reNum, C.reDay as reDay, C.reYoil , C.reMonth as reMonth, C.reOrd as reOrd, C.endFlag as endFlag, C.reCount as reCount, B.allDay as allDay, B.writerID , B.deptNM , B.ownerNM , B.title , DATE_FORMAT(B.writeDay, '%Y-%m-%d %T') writeDay FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE B JOIN TBL_RS_SCHEDULEREPETITION C ON B.ownerID = C.ownerID AND B.num = C.num AND B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE B.companyID = #v_p_companyID# AND B.ownerID = #v_p_ownerID# AND B.ApproveFlag = '1' AND B.num <> ( CASE #v_p_cmd# WHEN 'add' THEN -1 ELSE #v_p_num# END ) AND B.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT B.ownerID , B.num , B.pnum , B.companyID , B.writerID , B.deptNM , B.ownerNM , B.title , B.location , B.timeDisplay , DATE_FORMAT(B.startDate, '%Y-%m-%d %T') startDate , DATE_FORMAT(B.endDate, '%Y-%m-%d %T') endDate , B.allDay , B.alertTime , B.content , B.importance , B.reFlag , B.gresFlag , DATE_FORMAT(B.writeDay, '%Y-%m-%d %T') writeDay , B.entryList , B.characterID , B.attachFlag , B.publicFlag , B.ApproveFlag FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE B JOIN TBL_RS_SCHEDULEREPETITION C ON B.ownerID = C.ownerID AND B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND ( B.num = C.num OR ( B.pnum = C.num AND B.reFlag = 4 ) ) WHERE B.ownerID = #v_p_ownerID# AND B.pnum <> 0 AND B.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT member_id, access_lvl FROM TBL_RS_RESACL WHERE companyid = #companyID# AND resid = #resID# AND member_id = #memberID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT BRD_NM BRDNM , OWNERID , OWNERNM , HR.MAIL MAILADDRESS FROM TBL_RS_BRD RES JOIN TBL_USERMASTER HR ON RES.OwnerID = HR.CN AND RES.TENANT_ID = HR.TENANT_ID WHERE BRD_ID = #v_BRD_ID# AND RES.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT S.WRITERID, S.OWNERNM, S.DEPTNM, S.TITLE, DATE_FORMAT(S.STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') STARTDATE, DATE_FORMAT(S.ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') ENDDATE, T.BRD_NM, HR.MAIL FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE S INNER JOIN TBL_RS_BRD T ON S.OWNERID = T.BRD_ID AND S.TENANT_ID = T.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER HR ON S.WRITERID = HR.CN AND S.TENANT_ID = HR.TENANT_ID WHERE S.OWNERID = #resID# AND S.NUM = #num# AND S.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT OWNERID , NUM , PNUM , COMPANYID , WRITERID , DEPTNM , OWNERNM , TITLE , LOCATION , TIMEDISPLAY , DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') STARTDATE , DATE_FORMAT(ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') ENDDATE , ALLDAY , ALERTTIME , CONTENT , IMPORTANCE , REFLAG , GRESFLAG , DATE_FORMAT(WRITEDAY, '%Y-%m-%d %T') WRITEDAY , ENTRYLIST , CHARACTERID , ATTACHFLAG , PUBLICFLAG , APPROVEFLAG , SCHEDULEID FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND REFLAG = '4' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
